entries.name: Plugin metadata version coherence

entries.name: Translation domain coherence

entries.name: Basic readme.txt metadata validation
entries.command: rtk rg -n '^=== .+ ===$|^Contributors:|^Requires at least:|^Tested up to:|^Requires PHP:|^Stable tag:|^License:|^License URI:|^== (Description|Installation|Changelog|Privacy) ==$' readme.txt

entries.name: POT source-message presence
entries.notes: No non-empty msgid was found. POT metadata is synchronized to 2.2.5, but the full catalog requires WP-CLI regeneration before release.

entries.name: GPL license completeness markers
entries.command: rtk rg -n 'SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-2.0-or-later|GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE|Version 2, June 1991|END OF TERMS AND CONDITIONS|How to Apply These Terms to Your New Programs' LICENSE

entries.name: Common secret-pattern scan
entries.notes: ripgrep exit 1 means no matching secret patterns were found.

entries.name: PHP syntax availability gate
entries.notes: PHP is not on PATH; no php -l result exists and none may be reused.

entries.name: WP-CLI translation tooling availability gate
entries.notes: WP-CLI is not on PATH; the POT catalog was not regenerated.

entries.name: PHP 7.4 global QA
entries.command: rtk docker run --rm --volume "$((Get-Location).Path):/app" --workdir /app php:7.4-cli sh -lc 'vendor/bin/phpcs --standard=phpcs.xml.dist && vendor/bin/phpstan analyse --configuration=phpstan.neon.dist --memory-limit=1G && vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration=phpunit.xml.dist --testsuite=unit'
entries.notes: PHPCS, PHPStan and 3 unit tests/7 assertions passed; PHPStan requires 1G when loading WordPress stubs under PHP 7.4.

entries.name: PHP 8.3 syntax
entries.command: rtk docker run --rm --volume "$((Get-Location).Path):/app" --workdir /app php:8.3-cli -l <each plugin PHP file>

entries.name: WordPress environment smoke availability
entries.notes: Docker build could not resolve api.github.com while wp-env installed PHPUnit; no WordPress smoke, Plugin Check, or POT generation result exists.

entries.name: Public GitHub Actions baseline
entries.notes: PHP checks passed. The workflow then failed because rg was absent; wp-env started, but the old plugin slug check failed before Plugin Check and POT generation.

entries.name: Final PHPCS and PHPCompatibilityWP
entries.command: rtk docker run --rm --volume "$((Get-Location).Path):/app" --workdir /app php:7.4-cli vendor/bin/phpcs --standard=phpcs.xml.dist; rtk docker run --rm --volume "$((Get-Location).Path):/app" --workdir /app php:7.4-cli vendor/bin/phpcs --standard=PHPCompatibilityWP --runtime-set testVersion 7.4- image-usage-audit.php includes views uninstall.php
entries.notes: Commands ran in the parallel final QA batch; duration is the shared batch wall time. The single constant-only follow-up also passed both targeted checks.

entries.name: Final PHPStan
entries.command: rtk docker run --rm --volume "$((Get-Location).Path):/app" --workdir /app php:7.4-cli vendor/bin/phpstan analyse --configuration=phpstan.neon.dist --memory-limit=1G --no-progress
entries.notes: An initial final run identified MINUTE_IN_SECONDS missing from stubs. Replacing the equivalent class constant expression with 900 made the affected rerun pass with no errors.

entries.name: Final PHPUnit
entries.notes: 20 tests and 35 assertions. Earlier targeted attempts exposed and corrected the intentionally changed invalid-CDN behavior and PHPCS formatting issues.

entries.name: Final PHP and JavaScript syntax
entries.command: rtk docker run --rm --volume "$((Get-Location).Path):/app" --workdir /app php:7.4-cli sh -lc 'for file in image-usage-audit.php includes/*.php views/*.php uninstall.php tests/bootstrap.php tests/unit/*.php tests/integration/*.php; do php -l "$file" || exit 1; done'; rtk docker run --rm --volume "$((Get-Location).Path):/app" --workdir /app php:8.3-cli sh -lc 'for file in image-usage-audit.php includes/*.php views/*.php uninstall.php tests/bootstrap.php tests/unit/*.php tests/integration/*.php; do php -l "$file" || exit 1; done'; rtk node --check assets/admin.js
entries.notes: Duration is the shared parallel final QA batch wall time.

entries.name: Final dependency and license audit
entries.command: rtk docker run --rm --volume "$((Get-Location).Path):/app" --workdir /app composer:2 composer validate --strict --no-interaction; rtk docker run --rm --volume "$((Get-Location).Path):/app" --workdir /app composer:2 composer audit --locked --no-interaction; rtk npm audit --audit-level=high
entries.notes: The first Composer current audit found CVE-2026-24765 in PHPUnit 9.6.24. PHPUnit was updated to 9.6.35; the final audit reports no advisories. npm reports zero vulnerabilities. Composer 2.2 validation passes but that historical version has no audit command.

entries.name: Final metadata, JSON, YAML, XML and ZIP validation
entries.command: rtk npm run validate:metadata; rtk npm run validate:config; rtk proxy pwsh -NoProfile -Command '[xml](Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath "phpcs.xml.dist") | Out-Null; [xml](Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath "phpunit.xml.dist") | Out-Null; "XML validation passed"'; rtk npm run build:zip
entries.notes: Metadata: version 2.2.5, five tags, 124-character short description. ZIP: 11 entries under image-usage-audit/, required metadata present, development paths absent. The first XML shell expression was expanded incorrectly; the corrected targeted command parsed both files successfully.

entries.name: Final WordPress runtime, Plugin Check and POT attempt
entries.notes: The one permitted post-change retry failed while Docker built wp-env images: api.github.com could not be resolved during Composer downloads. Plugin Check, POT source-message generation, ZIP activation, functional/runtime access tests, and uninstall smoke were not executed locally.

entries.name: Final secret-pattern scan
entries.notes: ripgrep exit 1 means no matching secret patterns were found; duration is the shared final QA batch wall time.

entries.name: GitHub Actions runtime validation
entries.command: rtk proxy curl.exe -L -sS -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" "https://api.github.com/repos/ussmarines/WP_image_usage_audit/actions/runs?head_sha=b5a6601e5b628906a349d096f6fe0e53023c9533&per_page=20"; rtk proxy curl.exe -L -sS -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" "https://api.github.com/repos/ussmarines/WP_image_usage_audit/actions/runs/29207132911/jobs?per_page=20"
entries.tool_version: GitHub Actions runner; WP-CLI via wp-env; Plugin Check
entries.notes: The PHP 7.4 and 8.3 jobs passed. In wordpress-smoke, ZIP build/install/activation, smoke, Plugin Check and POT generation passed. The only failed step was the final POT diff because WP-CLI emitted a dynamic POT-Creation-Date; this is corrected in the uncommitted worktree.

entries.name: WordPress runtime availability retry
entries.notes: Docker could not resolve api.github.com while the wp-env CLI image installed PHPUnit. This is an external DNS failure; no plugin code was changed to work around it.

entries.name: Deterministic POT regeneration
entries.command: rtk docker run --rm --volume "D:\Program Files\Documents\GitHub\WP_image_usage_audit:/app" --workdir /app wordpress:cli-php7.4 wp i18n make-pot /app /app/languages/image-usage-audit.pot --domain=image-usage-audit --exclude=.agents,docs,tests,vendor,node_modules,scripts,dist --headers='{"POT-Creation-Date":"2026-07-12T20:07:43+00:00","Report-Msgid-Bugs-To":"https://github.com/ussmarines/WP_image_usage_audit/issues"}'
coverage: all PHP and JavaScript translation strings
entries.notes: Two consecutive generations produced SHA-256 C68FD00E4E3FB98AD91157C1A6A1B145B849B897FF6465D863F4F973C23B8624. The catalog has domain image-usage-audit, version 2.2.5, no local absolute references, and the repository issue URL.

entries.notes: Configuration validation parsed six JSON files and one YAML file. ZIP inspection passed with 11 allow-listed entries under image-usage-audit/.

entries.name: Successful public GitHub Actions final baseline
entries.tool_version: GitHub Actions; PHP 7.4/8.3; Node.js 24; WP-CLI via wp-env; Plugin Check
entries.notes: All four jobs and every required step completed successfully at the current source commit. This is the reusable runtime baseline for the documentation-only final pass.

entries.name: Final licensing-pass ZIP build
entries.notes: Generated dist/image-usage-audit.zip with root image-usage-audit/ and 11 entries. The documentation changes are excluded from the runtime package.

entries.name: Final ZIP entry and secret inspection
entries.command: rtk proxy pwsh -NoProfile -Command '$zip = (Resolve-Path -LiteralPath "dist/image-usage-audit.zip").Path; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $archive = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead($zip); try { $archive.Entries | Sort-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; $secretPattern = "BEGIN [A-Z ]*PRIVATE KEY|sk-[A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,}|gh[opusr]_[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}|AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}"; $matches = @(); foreach ($entry in $archive.Entries) { if ($entry.Length -eq 0) { continue }; $reader = [System.IO.StreamReader]::new($entry.Open()); try { $content = $reader.ReadToEnd() } finally { $reader.Dispose() }; if ($content -match $secretPattern) { $matches += $entry.FullName } }; if ($matches.Count -gt 0) { throw "Secret-like value found in ZIP: $($matches -join ", ")" }; "ZIP secret scan: pass" } finally { $archive.Dispose() }; Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 -LiteralPath $zip | Select-Object Algorithm,Hash,Path'
entries.notes: Every entry is under image-usage-audit/; no secret-like value was found. SHA-256: 9971C1096BBEAF0B60AFD340408EBF3914D11670FCD541DED9862745921347FA.

entries.name: Final worktree secret-pattern scan
coverage: entire worktree excluding Git, dependencies and generated ZIP
entries.notes: No common private-key or API-token pattern was found.
